Eloy Room.bio: A veteran goalkeeper who has been a stalwart presence for Curacao over the past decade. Room has built a successful career in Major League Soccer with Columbus Crew, where his shot-stopping ability and command of the penalty area have made him one of the most reliable keepers in the league.
Eloy Room.playingStyle: Experienced shot-stopper with excellent reflexes, strong command of the box, and reliable distribution to initiate build-up play from the back
keyStrengths: Aerial command of the penalty area
Eloy Room.worldCup2026Role: Undisputed starting goalkeeper and one of the most experienced players in the squad; his MLS pedigree provides crucial big-game composure for Curacao's historic first World Cup
Eloy Room.notableFact: Has been a key figure in Columbus Crew's MLS success and is one of the highest-profile players in Curacao's football history

Ziggy Rudolphus.bio: A homegrown talent plying his trade in the local Curacao league with RKSV Centro Dominguito. Rudolphus represents the domestic side of Curacao football, providing backup goalkeeping depth behind Eloy Room.
Ziggy Rudolphus.playingStyle: Athletic goalkeeper with good positioning and developing skills, comfortable playing in the domestic league environment
Ziggy Rudolphus.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper providing depth to the squad; his inclusion celebrates the domestic league's contribution to the national team
Ziggy Rudolphus.notableFact: One of the few players in the World Cup squad who plays in Curacao's domestic Sekshon Paga league

Jairzinho Pieter.bio: A young goalkeeper developing his career in the Netherlands with Jong Utrecht. Pieter represents the next generation of Curacao goalkeeping talent, gaining valuable experience in the Dutch football system.
Jairzinho Pieter.playingStyle: Modern goalkeeper with good footwork and distribution, developing his game in the competitive Dutch reserve league system
Jairzinho Pieter.worldCup2026Role: Backup goalkeeper gaining invaluable World Cup experience; his development in the Dutch system gives him a strong foundation for future tournaments
Jairzinho Pieter.notableFact: Developed through the Dutch football system, following a well-worn path for many Curacao internationals who leverage their Dutch ties

Juninho Bacuna.bio: The crown jewel of Curacao football, Juninho Bacuna is a dynamic midfielder who has played at Rangers in the Scottish Premiership. Born in the Netherlands to Curacao-heritage parents, he chose to represent the island nation and has become their most important creative force and talisman. Will be key to new coach Fred Rutten's plans after Dick Advocaat resigned in Feb 2026 for family reasons.
Juninho Bacuna.playingStyle: Box-to-box midfielder with excellent technical ability, powerful shooting from distance, and the vision to unlock defenses with incisive passing
keyStrengths: Physical power and engine in midfield
Juninho Bacuna.worldCup2026Role: The creative heartbeat of the team and primary set-piece taker; his quality is the single biggest reason Curacao can compete at the highest level
Juninho Bacuna.notableFact: Brother of Leandro Bacuna, making them one of the few sibling pairs to play together at a World Cup; previously played in the English Championship and Scottish Premiership

Cuco Martina.bio: The elder statesman of Curacao football, Cuco Martina has had a remarkable career spanning the Premier League with Southampton and Everton, and multiple European leagues. His experience at the highest level makes him an invaluable leader for this historic World Cup campaign, providing stability through the coaching transition from Advocaat to Rutten.
Cuco Martina.playingStyle: Versatile, experienced defender who can play across the back line, known for his tactical intelligence, aerial ability, and occasional spectacular long-range goals
Cuco Martina.worldCup2026Role: Veteran defensive leader and squad captain figure; his years in top European leagues provide the kind of experience money cannot buy for a small island nation
Cuco Martina.notableFact: Scored a stunning long-range goal against Arsenal while playing for Southampton in the Premier League, one of the greatest goals by a Curacao international

Rangelo Janga.bio: A tall, powerful striker who has been one of Curacao's most consistent goalscorers over the past several years. Janga has played across European leagues in Cyprus and previously in the Netherlands, using his physical presence and finishing ability to lead the line.
Rangelo Janga.playingStyle: Target striker with strong aerial ability, good hold-up play, and clinical finishing inside the box
keyStrengths: Hold-up play and link-up with midfield
Rangelo Janga.worldCup2026Role: Starting striker and primary aerial threat; his ability to hold the ball up and bring others into play will be crucial against physically dominant World Cup opponents
Rangelo Janga.notableFact: One of Curacao's all-time leading scorers, having consistently found the net across multiple qualifying campaigns

Kenji Gorre.bio: A tricky, pacy winger who developed in the Manchester City and Swansea City academies before establishing himself in the Eredivisie with NAC Breda. Gorre's dribbling ability and directness make him Curacao's most exciting attacking talent and a constant threat on the left flank.
Kenji Gorre.playingStyle: Explosive left winger with exceptional dribbling skills, blistering pace, and the ability to cut inside or go down the line to create chances
Kenji Gorre.worldCup2026Role: Starting left winger and primary creative outlet in attack; his ability to take on defenders one-on-one gives Curacao a genuine attacking weapon at the World Cup
Kenji Gorre.notableFact: Son of former Dutch international Dean Gorre, he chose to represent Curacao and has become one of their most important attacking players

Michael Maria.bio: A dependable left-back who has built a solid career in Scandinavian football with Helsingborg IF in Sweden. Maria provides defensive stability and overlapping runs down the left side, forming a reliable partnership with the wingers ahead of him.
Michael Maria.playingStyle: Steady, reliable left-back with good crossing ability, disciplined positioning, and the stamina to contribute to both attacking and defensive phases
keyStrengths: Crossing and delivery from the left
Michael Maria.worldCup2026Role: Starting left-back who provides width and defensive solidity; his experience in Scandinavian football has given him the tactical discipline needed for tournament play
Michael Maria.notableFact: One of the most capped players in the current Curacao squad, having been a fixture in the national team setup for many years

Jurien Gaari.bio: A young center-back developing in the Dutch second division with SC Cambuur. Gaari represents the future of Curacao's defense, combining physical attributes with the technical education of the Dutch football system.
Jurien Gaari.playingStyle: Ball-playing center-back with good aerial presence, comfortable on the ball, and developing his reading of the game in competitive Dutch football
Jurien Gaari.worldCup2026Role: Rotation center-back option who adds depth and future potential to the defensive unit; his Dutch football education means he is comfortable with possession-based play
Jurien Gaari.notableFact: Part of a new generation of Curacao defenders being developed through the Dutch football pyramid

Darryl Lachman.bio: A highly experienced center-back who has been a cornerstone of Curacao's defense for over a decade. Lachman has played extensively in the Dutch football system and brings old-school defensive grit combined with vital international experience.
Darryl Lachman.playingStyle: No-nonsense, physical center-back who excels in aerial duels, strong tackling, and organizing the defensive line with vocal communication
Darryl Lachman.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back and defensive leader; his vast international experience with Curacao makes him essential for marshaling the defense against World Cup-level attacking talent
Darryl Lachman.notableFact: One of the most capped players in Curacao history, having been an ever-present in the team's rise from Caribbean minnows to World Cup qualifiers

Shermaine Martina.bio: A versatile center-back playing in Curacao's domestic league with SV Robinhood. Martina provides squad depth and represents the local talent pool that has been integral to the national team's development.
Shermaine Martina.playingStyle: Solid, dependable center-back with good positioning, physical presence, and familiarity with the team's defensive system
Shermaine Martina.worldCup2026Role: Backup center-back providing depth and local representation; his inclusion underscores Curacao's commitment to developing domestic talent alongside the European-based stars
Shermaine Martina.notableFact: One of the locally-based players who has helped Curacao build a team culture bridging the island's domestic league and the European diaspora

Leandro Bacuna.bio: A vastly experienced midfielder who has spent his career in English football with Aston Villa and Cardiff City. The elder Bacuna brother brings Premier League and Championship pedigree to Curacao's midfield, with his versatility allowing him to play across multiple positions.
Leandro Bacuna.playingStyle: Physically powerful, versatile midfielder who can operate as a box-to-box player, right-back, or defensive midfielder, with a strong long-range shot and ability to cover ground
keyStrengths: Premier League experience and big-game mentality
Leandro Bacuna.worldCup2026Role: Key midfield presence whose versatility allows tactical flexibility; his English football pedigree and leadership make him one of the most important players in the squad
Leandro Bacuna.notableFact: Played in the Premier League for Aston Villa and made over 100 appearances in English football before committing his international future to Curacao

Gevaro Nepomuceno.bio: The number 10 and creative heartbeat of Curacao's domestic football, Nepomuceno is a diminutive playmaker with silky skills and vision. Despite playing in the local league, he has been a consistent performer for the national team with his technical ability.
Gevaro Nepomuceno.playingStyle: Creative attacking midfielder with excellent close control, quick feet, and the vision to find teammates with through balls in tight spaces
Gevaro Nepomuceno.worldCup2026Role: Creative option off the bench who can change games with his technical quality; his ability to unlock defenses in tight spaces provides a different dimension to Curacao's attack
Gevaro Nepomuceno.notableFact: One of the most decorated players in Curacao's domestic league, having been the creative hub of the national team for many years

Jarchinio Antonia.bio: A pacy right winger plying his trade in the Dutch second division with Excelsior Rotterdam. Antonia brings directness and speed to Curacao's attack, providing an alternative option on the flanks.
Jarchinio Antonia.playingStyle: Quick, direct winger who uses pace and dribbling to beat defenders, delivering crosses and creating chances from wide positions
Jarchinio Antonia.worldCup2026Role: Attacking rotation option on the right wing; his pace and directness make him a useful impact substitute when Curacao need to stretch opponents
Jarchinio Antonia.notableFact: Developed in the Dutch football system and has represented Curacao at various youth levels before establishing himself in the senior squad

Gervane Kastaneer.bio: An athletic, pacy right winger playing in the Eredivisie with Go Ahead Eagles. Kastaneer has experience across Dutch and English football and brings explosive athleticism to Curacao's wide positions.
Gervane Kastaneer.playingStyle: Explosive, athletic winger with raw pace, physical power, and the ability to beat defenders with sheer speed and directness
Gervane Kastaneer.worldCup2026Role: Impact winger who can stretch defenses with his pace; his Eredivisie form makes him a key part of Curacao's plans to cause problems on the counter-attack
Gervane Kastaneer.notableFact: Previously played in English football with Coventry City, adding to his experience across different European leagues

Brandley Kuwas.bio: A skillful left-footed winger who has been a consistent performer in the Eredivisie with Heracles Almelo. Kuwas is known for his ability to cut inside from the left and create chances or score with his favored foot.
Brandley Kuwas.playingStyle: Technically gifted inverted winger who likes to cut inside from the left onto his preferred foot, delivering crosses or curling shots toward goal
Brandley Kuwas.worldCup2026Role: Experienced wide option who provides technical quality and goal threat from the flanks; his Eredivisie experience ensures he is comfortable at a high level
Brandley Kuwas.notableFact: One of the most consistent performers in the Dutch top flight among Curacao internationals, known for his reliable output of goals and assists

Elson Hooi.bio: A veteran winger with extensive experience in Dutch football, Hooi has been one of Curacao's most prolific attackers over the years. His combination of goals and assists from wide positions has made him a national team stalwart.
Elson Hooi.playingStyle: Experienced attacking winger with good movement, intelligent runs behind the defense, and the ability to score consistently from wide areas
Elson Hooi.worldCup2026Role: Veteran attacking option whose experience and goal threat make him a valuable squad member; his long service to the national team embodies Curacao's football journey
Elson Hooi.notableFact: One of the highest-scoring wingers in Curacao's international history, having contributed consistently across multiple qualifying campaigns

Vurnon Anita.bio: One of the most decorated players in Curacao's history, Vurnon Anita enjoyed a distinguished career at Ajax, Newcastle United in the Premier League, and various European clubs. His return to the national team brings invaluable experience and tactical intelligence.
Vurnon Anita.playingStyle: Intelligent, composed defensive midfielder with excellent positional awareness, tidy passing, and the ability to read the game and break up opposition attacks
keyStrengths: Premier League and Champions League experience
Vurnon Anita.worldCup2026Role: Veteran midfield anchor whose experience at Ajax and Newcastle is unmatched in the squad; his tactical brain and composure will be vital in controlling World Cup matches
Vurnon Anita.notableFact: Played Champions League football with Ajax and spent three seasons in the Premier League with Newcastle United, making him arguably the most decorated player in Curacao history

Sheraldo Becker.bio: A rapid, exciting attacker who has played in the Belgian Pro League and previously made a name for himself in the Bundesliga with Union Berlin. Becker's pace and directness make him one of Curacao's most dangerous attacking weapons.
Sheraldo Becker.playingStyle: Lightning-fast forward with explosive acceleration, good dribbling in space, and the ability to run in behind defenses to create and score goals
keyStrengths: Finishing and composure in front of goal
Sheraldo Becker.worldCup2026Role: Key attacking weapon whose pace can trouble any defense in the world; his Bundesliga and Belgian league experience means he has performed at a high European level
Sheraldo Becker.notableFact: Had a breakout season at Union Berlin in the Bundesliga, scoring goals that helped the club challenge for the league title in a remarkable underdog story

Charlison Benschop.bio: A veteran striker who has been a reliable goalscorer for Curacao across many years. Benschop has played across Dutch football and brings physicality, aerial ability, and proven finishing to the attacking line.
Charlison Benschop.playingStyle: Strong, physical target man with good aerial ability, hold-up play, and the experience to find the net consistently at international level
Charlison Benschop.worldCup2026Role: Experienced backup striker who provides a physical alternative in attack; his aerial presence makes him a useful option for set pieces and late-game situations
Charlison Benschop.notableFact: One of Curacao's all-time top scorers, having consistently delivered goals in major international competitions

Shanon Carmelia.bio: A young, energetic midfielder developing in Dutch football with Telstar. Carmelia represents the exciting future of Curacao football, bringing youthful dynamism to the midfield ranks.
Shanon Carmelia.playingStyle: Energetic, mobile central midfielder with good passing, a willingness to press, and developing all-round qualities in the Dutch football system
Shanon Carmelia.worldCup2026Role: Young midfield prospect gaining invaluable World Cup experience; his energy and pressing ability make him a useful option when fresh legs are needed
Shanon Carmelia.notableFact: One of the youngest players in the Curacao World Cup squad, representing the next generation of talent from the island

Jamilhio Ricardinho.bio: A disciplined defensive midfielder playing in the Dutch second division with SBV Excelsior. Ricardinho provides important defensive cover and ball-winning ability in Curacao's midfield.
Jamilhio Ricardinho.playingStyle: Combative defensive midfielder who screens the back line effectively, wins tackles, and keeps possession ticking over with simple, effective passing
Jamilhio Ricardinho.worldCup2026Role: Defensive midfield rotation option who adds solidity and protection for the back line; his disciplined approach is valuable in tournament scenarios requiring pragmatic play
Jamilhio Ricardinho.notableFact: Has developed steadily through the Dutch football system and represents the depth of talent available to Curacao's national team program

Roderick Miller.bio: A tall, commanding center-back playing in the Dutch second division with FC Emmen. Miller adds physical presence and defensive depth to Curacao's backline options.
Roderick Miller.playingStyle: Physically imposing center-back with strong aerial ability, solid tackling, and a commanding presence in the defensive third
Roderick Miller.worldCup2026Role: Defensive depth option whose physical attributes make him useful for specific game situations; his aerial presence adds a set-piece threat at both ends
Roderick Miller.notableFact: Part of Curacao's defensive contingent in the Dutch lower divisions, contributing to the strong pipeline of defenders available to the national team
